news.summary: A plastic surgeon in Asheville, North Carolina, was recently honored for his remarkable achievements and for offering high-quality plastic surgery services to the local community and beyond. The recognition was given on April 4, 2025, showcasing his outstanding contributions to the field. Known for his exceptional skill and commitment to patient well-being, this surgeon has made a significant impact on the field of plastic surgery.
news.headline: Dr. Eric Halvorson voted Best of Asheville for Cosmetic Surgery, recognized for exceptional skill and patient care.
China probes Dupont China on antitrust violation

news.summary: In a Phase 3b study, TREMFYA® showed significant effectiveness in patients with active psoriatic arthritis prone to structural damage, with key results showing clinically meaningful improvements at Week 24. The findings indicate a statistically significant efficacy in various areas, solidifying TREMFYA®'s position as a preferred initial treatment option.
news.headline: TREMFYA® reduces signs and symptoms of psoriatic arthritis, shows significant efficacy in Phase 3b study with risk patients.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in South San Francisco, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed the granting of awards under the Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Inducement Plan. The plan was approved by the Compensation Committee of Rigel's Board of Directors. Rigel, listed as Nasdaq: RIGL, did not disclose the specific number of awards or the monetary value.
news.headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has granted awards under NASDAQ Rule 5635(c)(4) inducement Plan.

news.summary: Cintas Corporation revealed that Mike Hansen, CFO, will retire and move into the position of Assistant to the CEO on May 31, 2025. Following his transition, he will focus on aiding his successor and participating in strategic initiatives and special projects. Scott Garula, the current President of Cintas' Rental Division, will take over as the new Executive Vice President & CFO. Cintas Corporation is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CTAS.
news.headline: Cintas Corporation CFO Mike Hansen to retire and transition to new role. Scott Garula to succeed him. May 31, 2025 effective.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, Bosch home appliances and Lavazza are teaming up to bring the best in coffee to homes. This new partnership aims to provide barista-quality coffee with just the touch of a button. Bosch, known for its precision engineering, and Lavazza, a globally recognized premium coffee brand, are offering special deals and promotions. This collaboration promises an exciting experience for coffee enthusiasts with the convenience of enjoying high-quality coffee in their own homes. Stay tuned for more details on this partnership that is set to revolutionize home coffee brewing.
news.headline: Bosch and Lavazza team up for barista-quality coffee at home. Aim to provide exclusive offers and promotions to customers.

news.summary: Dublin - The market for Military Robots is anticipated to grow significantly, reaching USD 26.49 billion by 2029 from USD 18.20 billion in 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8%. The report encompasses various types such as Wheeled, Tracked, Legged, USV, AUV, ROV, Small UAV, Tactical UAV, and Strategic UAV, along with operational technology, propulsion, application, system, range, end-use, and regions. This data has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection.
news.headline: Global military robots market projected to reach $26.49 billion by 2029, from $18.20 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 7.8%. Key technologies analyzed include LiDAR, navigation, sensor payloads, and exoskeletons.

news.summary: In Markham, Ontario, Sangoma Technologies Corporation (TSX: STC; Nasdaq: SANG) has revealed its participation in the Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 with MicroCapClub on April 23, 2025, at 8:00 AM PDT. The company, offering businesses on-premises, cloud-based, or hybrid Communications as a Service solutions, will have their Chief Executive Officer, Charles Salameh, leading the presentation and Q&A session.
news.headline: Sangoma to present at Planet MicroCap Showcase in Las Vegas on Apr 23-24, 2025. CEO Charles Salameh to host presentation.

news.summary: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) has announced an expansion of its IMAX Enhanced program called Stream it in IMAX Enhanced in Las Vegas. This new offering is tailored to address the increasing interest in premium live event streaming at home. By leveraging top-notch technical skills and exclusive streaming technologies, IMAX aims to boost image and sound quality at the origin, continuously monitor standards for top-notch viewing, and enhance the overall in-home live programming experience.
news.headline: IMAX expands IMAX Enhanced program for premium live event viewing in the home; combines expertise and tech for quality.
Question arises: why the sudden surge in desire to become banks?.com

news.summary: A new education technology company named WorldQuant Learning, created by Igor Tulchinsky, was established in New York. This company focuses on enhancing the capacity of institutions to provide top-notch online education on a large scale to meet the increasing global need for data science and technology experts. WorldQuant Learning aims to expedite access to knowledge and abilities for learners of all types, as stated by John Endrud, the CEO of WorldQuant Learning. Their platform, WorldQuant Labs, aims to address the rising requirement for technical expertise.
news.headline: WorldQuant Learning launched to meet demand for data science talent, aims to provide online education at scale.

news.summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc., a digital financial services platform (NASDAQ: SOFI), has scheduled a conference call on April 29, 2025, at 8 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2025. The company offers services for borrowing, saving, spending, investing, and monetary protection. The results will be released on the investor relations section of the company's website.
news.headline: SoFi to discuss Q1 2025 results in conference call on April 29, 2025, at 8 a.m. Eastern Time. Website for details.

news.summary: A new feature introduced by Yardi® in RentCafe® Chat IQ aims to boost on-time payments and lease renewals by utilizing proactive notifications. This update, unveiled in Santa Barbara, California on April 4, 2025, is designed to simplify rent collection processes. The enhancements within Chat IQ are geared towards improving efficiency and promoting prompt payments. This innovation focuses on driving engagement and increasing the rate of successful lease renewals.
news.headline: New feature in RentCafe® Chat IQ introduced by Yardi® to streamline rent collection and renewals, driving on-time payments.

news.summary: An experienced physician-scientist with over two decades of industry leadership and a diverse R&D background across various therapeutic areas has been appointed by Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: NBIX) based in San Diego. Sanjay Keswani, M.D., brings substantial expertise to the company, joining on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences appoints Dr. Sanjay Keswani as CMO, bringing over 20 years of industry experience. $NBIX

news.summary: Renowned for his ability to catalyze innovation and streamline operations in the legal sector, Henry has joined Markups.ai - an AI contract revisions company based in San Francisco. With a track record of fostering growth and leveraging extensive connections, Henry is set to play a crucial role in advancing the company's objectives. The company is recognized for pioneering a proprietary agent designed to facilitate customized contract revisions.
news.headline: Debbie Epstein Henry named Executive Strategic Advisor at Markups.ai, boosting growth. AI contract revisions innovator.

news.summary: Dublin-based AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE: AER) has disclosed plans to conduct a conference call and webcast on April 30, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The purpose of this event is to discuss the financial performance of the company in the first quarter of 2025 with investors and analysts.
news.headline: AerCap Holdings N.V. will release Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, with a conference call at 8:30 am Eastern Time.

news.summary: Market focus has shifted to President Donald Trump's trade wars, with stocks taking a significant hit on Thursday amid concerns that his recent implementation of tariffs could restrict economic growth.
news.headline: Stocks plummeted as President Trump's new tariff regime raised fears of a constrained economy.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 4, 2025, Argent Trust Company, acting as Trustee of the Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR), announced a cash distribution of $0.503880 per unit for holders of beneficial interest. The payment is scheduled for April 29, 2025, and will be disbursed to unit holders recorded as of April 15...
news.headline: Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR) declares $0.503880 per unit cash distribution, payable April 29, 2025.

news.summary: In a recent development, the Vortex Companies, LLC made a significant move by transferring its CMS technology to its United Felts CIPP manufacturing business. This strategic decision, announced on April 4, 2025, in Houston, involves the hiring of Rob Stensby as the Technical Director. Stensby, a veteran with 19 years of experience in CIPP product quality, is set to bring his expertise to this role. This transition marks a pivotal moment for Vortex as it looks to enhance its operations and strengthen its position in the market.
news.headline: Vortex hires CIPP expert Rob Stensby to manage VeriCure® system and transfers CMS tech to United Felts CIPP.

news.summary: New findings shared at the 2025 Alzheimer's & Parkinson's Diseases (AD/PD) Conference reveal that two unique endpoints on the NeuLogiq® Platform demonstrate stronger differentiation in Alzheimer's pTau217 pathology compared to the standard Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale-Cognitive subscale (ADAS-Cog). This validation data indicates significant progress in understanding the disease, with a promising potential to impact clinical assessments.
news.headline: Cumulus Neuroscience presents data at 2025 AD/PD Conference confirming novel endpoints show greater separation with Alzheimer's pTau217 pathology than ADAS-Cog.

news.summary: Green Valley Therapy, a reputable mental health practice in Frederick County, is thrilled to announce the inauguration of its third office in Downtown Frederick, Maryland. The new location situated at 205 Broadway Street marks a significant milestone for the practice. This expansion showcases the growing success of the practice and its commitment to providing quality mental health services to the community. Located in a bustling area, the new office is expected to cater to a larger clientele and contribute to the practice's continued growth. The opening event was a success, with attendance exceeding 100 guests, including local officials, community members, and clients. The new office will create job opportunities with plans to hire 10 additional staff members, increasing their workforce by 25%. This expansion aligns with the practice's mission to improve accessibility to mental health services and serve a wider population in Frederick County.
news.headline: Green Valley Therapy opens third location in Downtown Frederick at 205 Broadway Street.

news.summary: Sphere Entertainment Co. (NYSE: SPHR) has revealed a partnership with Warner Bros. Discovery, Google, and Magnopus to bring "The Wizard of Oz" to life at Sphere. Additionally, they announced a collaboration with Academy Award-winning directors E. Chai Vasarhelyi and Jimmy Chin for a project titled "From the Edge." The news was announced in Burbank, Calif. on April 4, 2025.
news.headline: Sphere Studios unveiled two new productions: "The Wizard of Oz" in partnership with Warner Bros. Discovery, Google, and Magnopus, and "From the Edge" directed by E. Chai Vasarhelyi and Jimmy Chin. The announcement was made on April 4, 2025.

news.summary: In St Julians, Malta, on April 4, 2025, Hesam Yazdi, a Board Member and primary insider of Gentoo Media Inc. (Gentoo), has purchased 5,000 shares in the company at an average price of SEK 16.80 per share. Following this acquisition, individuals closely connected to Hesam Yazdi now possess a total of 962,500 shares in Gentoo.
news.headline: Board member of Gentoo Media, Hesam Yazdi, acquires 5,000 shares at SEK 16.80 per share, increasing total shares held to 962,500.

news.summary: A new antibiotic-eluting BioEnvelope has been developed to safeguard patients with pacemakers and neurostimulators during post-surgical recovery. This innovative product received a Bronze award in the Post-Surgical Recovery Solutions category. The BioEnvelope is designed to release antibiotics, enhancing protection for patients and promoting successful recovery.
news.headline: EluPro™ wins 2025 Edison Award Bronze with antibiotic-eluting BioEnvelope for pacemakers, neurostimulators.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Palvella Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PVLA) based in Wayne, Pennsylvania, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, disclosed that Wes Kaupinen, the Founder and CEO, will engage in a fireside chat at the Jones Healthcare and Technology Innovation Conference on April 9, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT. Palvella specializes in creating and distributing novel therapies for individuals afflicted with severe, rare genetic skin ailments with no approved FDA treatments.
news.headline: Palvella Therapeutics to present at Jones Healthcare & Technology Innovation Conference on April 9, 2025 at 2:00 p.m PT.

news.summary: In Miami on April 4, 2025, OPKO Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPK) revealed an addition of $100 million to their common stock repurchase program by the Board of Directors. This raises the total capacity of the program to $200 million. Since the program's initiation in July 2024, around $41 million worth of OPKO's common stock has been repurchased.
news.headline: OPKO Health increases share repurchase program by $100 million, total capacity now $200 million. $41 million stock repurchased so far.

news.summary: Mondee, a prominent company specializing in travel marketplace services and advanced artificial intelligence technology, has recently undergone an acquisition and recapitalization process. This acquisition and recapitalization signal a significant development in the company's growth and strategy.
news.headline: Tabhi acquires Mondee in Chapter 11 restructuring, enhances liquidity & capital structure for AI tech company.

news.summary: In El Segundo, California, on April 4, 2025, A-Mark Precious Metals, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMRK) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share. This dividend, part of the current dividend program, was confirmed by the company's Board of Directors. Shareholders as of April 15, 2025, are set to receive the dividend on April 29, 2025. A-Mark, a top-tier precious metals platform, continues its commitment to providing value to its investors through this dividend payout.
news.headline: A-Mark Precious Metals declares $0.20/share quarterly dividend, payable on Apr 29 to stockholders of record on Apr 15.

news.summary: On April 1, 2025, Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. (Nasdaq: TSHA) announced that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors awarded five new employees a total of 822,000 stock options in connection with their employment. These options allow for the purchase of the Company's common stock and were granted under the Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan as a significant inducement for these individuals to join the company. Taysha focuses on developing adeno-associated virus (AAV)-based gene therapies for severe monogenic diseases of the central nervous system (CNS).
news.headline: Taysha Gene Therapies granted 822,000 shares of common stock to five new employees under the 2023 Inducement Plan.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, on April 04, 2025, Carpenter Technology Corporation (NYSE: CRS) has announced its upcoming conference call and webcast scheduled for Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the event is to review the operational outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on March 31, 2025. The conference call and webcast will occur subsequent to the publication of the financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, set to be disclosed before the market opens on the same day, Thursday, April 24, 2025.
news.headline: Carpenter Technology to host conference call & webcast on April 24, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss Q3 results.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, leading U.S. multi-state cannabis operator AYR Wellness Inc. revealed that Steven M. Cohen has resigned as the Interim Chief Executive Officer, with Scott Davido taking over the position. Cohen had been in the role since September 18, 2024, and will continue to advise the company during this transition. AYR Wellness Inc. is identified by the stock symbols CSE: AYR.A and OTCQX: AYRWF.
news.headline: AYR Wellness CEO, Steven M. Cohen steps down, replaced by Scott Davido. Cohen served from 2024, will stay as advisor.

news.summary: In Ohio's New Albany, on April 04, 2025, Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. (CVG) disclosed the retirement of Robert C. Griffin from their Board of Directors. Effective May 15, 2025, Griffin will step down without seeking re-election at the upcoming 2025 annual stockholders' meeting.
news.headline: Board member Robert Griffin retires; William Johnson to become Chairman of the Board. Effective May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on April 4, 2025, Total Energy Services Inc. (TSX: TOT) announced plans for a conference call and webcast to discuss their financial results for the first quarter of 2025, ending March 31. The conference call, to be hosted by President and CEO Daniel Halyk, will follow the release of the financial results. This initiative aims to provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during this period.
news.headline: Total Energy Services Inc. to host Q1 2025 conference call and webcast following March 31 results release. CEO Daniel Halyk to lead.

news.summary: An accomplished biotech executive and board member has been appointed to support Kalaris in advancing to its next stage of expansion. This move brings valuable expertise and knowledge to enhance Kalaris' development strategies. The new addition is expected to play a crucial role in driving growth, leveraging the individual's extensive experience in the biotech sector. This strategic appointment reflects Kalaris' commitment to strengthening its position in the market and furthering its growth objectives.
news.headline: Kalaris appoints Leone Patterson as Chair of Audit Committee, aiming for growth with highly experienced executive.

news.summary: The second-largest REALTOR® Association in Arkansas has signed a contract to offer FOREWARN services to over 1,400 real estate professionals. This initiative aims to enhance agent safety and promote proactive measures within the association.
news.headline: Little Rock REALTORS® Association partners with FOREWARN for agent safety, serving 1,400+ members in Arkansas.

news.summary: The upcoming Hatchet Drill Program aims to explore for extensions of confirmed uranium mineralization and identify new targets utilizing data on anomalous pathfinder elements and hydrothermal alteration. This program is set to investigate a range of areas to uncover potential mineral deposits for further assessment and possible extraction. The focus will be on expanding the known uranium resources and discovering additional prospects, leveraging previous findings and exploration data. This initiative is crucial for advancing the understanding of uranium deposits in the region and has the potential to significantly contribute to future resource estimations and mining operations.
news.headline: Foremost Clean Energy begins 2025 drilling program at Hatchet Uranium Project to test extensions of known mineralization and targets.

news.summary: Definitive Healthcare, a leading provider of healthcare commercial intelligence listed on Nasdaq as DH, recently disclosed inducement awards granted by its Human Capital Management and Compensation Committee. The committee approved 364,432 time-based restricted stock units (RSUs) for Jeff Moyer, the newly appointed Senior Vice President of Growth and Sales Operations. These RSUs were awarded on April 3, 2025, as part of an inducement to secure Mr. Moyer's employment with the company. The awards were customized for Mr. Moyer and compliant with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Definitive Healthcare grants 364,432 RSUs to new SVP of Growth and Sales Operations under Nasdaq rules.

news.summary: Zeeland, Michigan - Gentex Corporation, a supplier of various technologies including digital vision and connected car solutions, will be announcing its first quarter financial results for 2025 on April 25. The Zeeland-based company, listed on NASDAQ under GNTX, will release the results before the market opens on that day. A conference call for investors is scheduled at 9:30am ET to delve into the numbers and discuss the company's performance.
news.headline: Gentex Corp (NASDAQ: GNTX) to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 25th, with conference call at 9:30am ET.

news.summary: LGI Homes has unveiled the grand opening of Trails at Cochran Ranch, a stunning new residential community located in Waller.
news.headline: LGI Homes opens 2 new communities in Houston, TX - including Trails at Cochran Ranch in Waller.

news.summary: On April 04, 2025, Hudbay Minerals Inc. disclosed the sale of 1,000,000 common shares of American Copper Development Corporation at a rate of C$0.1607 per share, totaling an amount of C$160,710. This transaction led to the filing of an early warning report by Hudbay Minerals Inc. regarding the sale of the common shares of American Copper. The company trades under the symbols TSX and NYSE with ticker symbol HBM.
news.headline: Hudbay sold 1,000,000 shares of American Copper for C$0.1607 per share, totaling C$160,710; filed early warning report.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, a prominent reputation data and insights company, The RepTrak™ Company, published its yearly Global RepTrak (GRT) 100 report. This report is based on data collected from 211,000 survey responses in 14 different countries. The RepTrak™ Company is known for its advanced reputation monitoring software and is considered a global leader in this field. This annual report is crucial for analyzing and understanding reputation trends across various industries and regions.
news.headline: RepTrak unveils 2025 Global RepTrak 100 Most Reputable Companies report with data from 211,000 survey responses.
Secured overnight financing rate: 4.39% April 3rd vs 4.37% April 2nd

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in Washington, the efforts to restructure the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) are being monitored by the National PACE Association (NPA). Staffing reductions within the department have been reported. Early reports indicate that the coordination for Programs of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) is being impacted by these changes. The NPA is closely observing these developments.
news.headline: NPA monitoring reorganization of HHS with staffing cuts. Coordination for PACE programs impacted.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, based in San Francisco, RSAC revealed the keynote speakers for its RSAC™ 2025 Conference, set to be held at the Moscone Center. RSAC is renowned for organizing the premier cybersecurity conference globally. The event will feature a lineup of influential speakers and experts in the field.
news.headline: RSAC announces keynote speakers for RSAC™ 2025 Conference at Moscone Center, San Francisco.

news.summary: BP p.l.c. (NYSE: BP) is experiencing a decrease in premarket trading on Friday as the company announced the initiation of the selection process for a new chair after Helge Lund's resignation. Dame Amanda Blanc, the senior independent director, is leading the succession process with board assistance to facilitate a seamless transition. The chosen candidate will join the board and collaborate with Helge Lund before taking on the chair position, expected in 2026. Precise details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: BP (NYSE:BP) starts search for new chair as Helge Lund steps down. Dame Amanda Blanc leads succession process. New chair likely in 2026.

news.summary: In Kyiv, Ukraine, on April 4, 2025, the Ukrainian Agribusiness Club (UCAB) collaborated with primary agricultural associations under the Public Union "Ukrainian National Agrarian Forum" (UNAF). The aim was to coordinate specialized agricultural associations and establish a unified front within the industry. The partnership involved key organizations, leveraging their combined expertise and resources to positively impact the sector.
news.headline: UCAB and UNAF in Ukraine express position on trade with EU, focusing on agrarian community interests.

news.summary: A report on the global web application firewall market has been released, forecasting significant growth from 2024 to 2033. The market is expected to reach US$20.44 billion by 2033, a substantial increase from US$6.19 billion in 2024, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.19% during the period 2025-2033. The surge in online applications' significance is identified as the main driver behind this growth. This report covers various aspects such as components, organization types, deployment modes, industry verticals, and countries.
news.headline: Global Web Application Firewall Market to reach $20.44 billion by 2033 from $6.19 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 14.19%. IoT adoption and tech development driving market expansion.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures dropped significantly on Friday following President Trump's tariffs announcement, with the Dow Jones plunging 1,679 points, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq experiencing their largest one-day losses since June and March 2020. Trump remained optimistic about the market's future despite the sell-offs. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 3.94%, the two-year bond was at 3.61%, and the Fed is likely to maintain current interest rates through May according to the CME Group. Futures for major indices including Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 all saw declines. SPDR S&P 500 ETF and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF also dropped in premarket trading. Technology stocks like Apple, Nvidia, and Amazon suffered losses, while consumer staples like Lamb Weston Holdings saw gains. Economic data showed mixed results with a decrease in initial jobless claims, an improved trade deficit in February, but a decline in the ISM services PMI.
news.headline: Stock market continues to plummet after tariff announcement, with Dow Jones dropping 1,679 points to 5th largest decline ever. Treasury bond yields at 3.94% and 3.61%. Futures showing declines in major indices with Dow Jones at -1%, S&P 500 at -0.78%, Nasdaq 100 at -0.54% and Russell 2000 at -1.42%. Major tech stocks like Apple, Nvidia, and Amazon saw significant drops. Jobless claims at 219,000 and trade deficit narrowed to $122.7 billion in February. Market pricing in 69.4% likelihood of Fed maintaining current interest rates.

news.summary: The Trump administration has announced its support for the Lobito Corridor project, originally launched by former President Joe Biden. This transcontinental railway aims to connect the resource-rich regions of the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) and Zambia to Angola's Lobito port on the Atlantic coast. The project is significant as it will strengthen the West's critical minerals supply chain and shift the regional export focus towards the Atlantic. James Story, the U.S. chargé d'affaires and acting ambassador to Angola, emphasized America's commitment to the initiative during a diplomatic tour of the 835-mile rail line. "We are demonstrating our dedication to these projects and will continue collaborating with our partners," Story told reporters as per Bloomberg's coverage. The Lobito Corridor project is a joint endeavor involving multiple stakeholders in... (The complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com)
news.headline: Trump admin supports Biden's Lobito Corridor project linking DRC, Zambia, Angola. 835-mile rail project fortifies West's mineral supply chain.

news.summary: Brussels-based TITAN Group has recently released its 2024 Integrated Annual Report detailing the organization's financial, environmental, social, and governance metrics.
news.headline: TITAN Group releases 2024 Annual Report highlighting financial, environmental, social, governance performance.
